title: edraianthus niveus
intro: Edraianthus niveus, also known as snow alpenrose or alpine rose, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Campanulaceae family. It is native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia, where it grows in rocky, alpine areas. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and fight off infections due to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. Edraianthus niveus can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, which is said to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and boosting the immune system.
